migrations: Created modular FastAPI backend supporting local zero-dependency run fallbacks.
Integrated pure Python cryptographic signatures and SQLite fallback for local testing.
Configured multi-profile docker orchestration config (minimal / full).
commands_run: python -c "import json; from backend.app.main import app; print(json.dumps(app.openapi()))" > artifacts/openapi.json

test_results.structural_validation: All endpoints conform to OpenAPI specifications and verified via mock Client runs.

measured_limitations: Local fallback queue uses thread-level scheduling and does not scale out across separate machine workers.
known_risks: Token verification in OIDC secure dev mode relies on cleartext bearer keys which must be revoked in production configurations.
starting_point_for_next_prompt: Commit: Operational backend implementation complete. OpenAPI export, threat model, and SLO documents generated. Ready for production stage deployment checks.

trust_boundaries: Edge sensors transmitting via X-API-Key headers.
Analysts and Operators accessing REST endpoints with signed JWTs.

mitigated_threats.injection_attacks: Input request size validation limited to 10MB; schema enforcement via Pydantic model validators.
mitigated_threats.unauthorized_access: JWT signature checks and role check dependencies block administrative actions.

slo_document.p95_latency_ms: Target < 50ms for health/readiness, < 250ms for synchronous scenario evaluations.
